features.name: Project Scaffold
features.description: New root package.json, tsconfig, tsup config, directory structure, copy system prompts
scenarios: Given the repo root, when npm install runs, then all deps install without error
Given the scaffold, when tsc --noEmit runs, then it succeeds with no source files

features.name: Types, Paths, Events, Config
features.description: Shared foundations: event types, runtime paths, typed EventEmitter, config load/save
scenarios: Given no config file exists, when loadConfig() is called, then it returns defaults with claude-sonnet-4-6
Given a config is saved, when loadConfig() is called, then it returns the saved values
Given a TypedEmitter, when an event is emitted, then subscribers receive typed event data

features.name: Agent SDK Client & Security
features.description: Options factory for query() calls, bash command allowlist hook
scenarios: Given role=generator, when makeQueryOptions is called, then it returns correct model and prompt
Given 'npm run test', when bashSecurityHook is called, then it returns allow
Given 'sudo rm -rf /', when bashSecurityHook is called, then it returns deny

features.name: Progress Tracking
features.description: Read/write feature_list.json, find next incomplete feature
scenarios: Given no feature_list.json, when readProgress is called, then it returns null
Given a feature_list.json with 3/5 passing, when readProgress is called, then percent is 60

features.name: Validators (Node/TS only)
features.description: Detect package manager and scripts from package.json, run validators with timeouts
scenarios: Given a package.json with pnpm-lock.yaml, when detectValidators is called, then packageManager is pnpm
Given validators pass, when allPassed is called, then it returns true

features.name: SQLite Storage
features.description: Session, feature, timeline, commit tables via better-sqlite3
scenarios: Given a new db, when createSession is called, then getSession returns the session
Given features inserted, when getFeatureSummary is called, then total and passing counts are correct

features.name: Planner Agent
features.description: One-shot agent that decomposes spec into feature_list.json via claude-agent-sdk
scenarios: Given a spec file, when runPlanner completes, then feature_list.json exists in the output dir

features.name: Generator Agent
features.description: Per-feature agent that implements via TDD with 5-min timeout and 50-turn cap
scenarios: Given a feature and no feedback, when runGenerator completes, then it returns success/cost/error

features.name: Evaluator Agent
features.description: Adversarial reviewer with weighted rubric, min 7.0 to pass
scenarios: Given a completed feature, when runEvaluator completes, then it returns score and dimension breakdown

features.name: Orchestrator Core Loop
features.description: Greenfield planner->generator->evaluator loop with event emission, extends TypedEmitter
scenarios: Given a spec, when orchestrator.run() completes, then sessionStart and sessionComplete events were emitted
Given a simple feature, when the loop processes it, then evaluator is skipped

features.name: CLI Entry Point
features.description: meow CLI routing: salazar run <spec> (headless), salazar (TUI), salazar config, salazar history
scenarios: Given 'salazar run spec.md', when the CLI parses args, then it spawns the orchestrator headless
Given 'salazar --help', then it prints usage text

features.name: TUI Integration
features.description: useEngine hook subscribes to orchestrator events, existing Ink components rewired
scenarios: Given a running orchestrator, when featureStart is emitted, then the TUI progress updates
Given the TUI launches, when no spec is given, then it shows the onboarding/launcher view

features.name: Build, Package, Clean Up
features.description: Remove Python artifacts, update README, verify npm link works
scenarios: Given 'npm run build', when it completes, then dist/index.js exists with shebang
Given 'npm link && salazar --help', then help text prints correctly

features.name: Smoke Test on Real Spec
features.description: Run ported Salazar against a minimal spec, verify end-to-end output
scenarios: Given a counter library spec, when salazar run completes, then features were planned and built
Given the output directory, when tests are run, then they pass

features.name: npx Support
features.description: npx salazar@latest works without prior install

features.name: Explorer Agent
features.description: TS-native codebase scanning with gitignore awareness
